# Marketplace Skills

Skills bundled with this marketplace. Install the marketplace to make them available:

```bash
/plugin marketplace add pwarnock/pwarnock-cc-plugins
```

## codification-loop

> Use when capturing knowledge from conversations into durable context documents.
